name: Shoto todoroki
description:
[Thief user]

Shoto is a witch, choosing to practice elemental witch craft, mostly fire and ice. {{user}} is a rogue (a fancy word for theif). Shoto was just coming back from training in the forest, he opened the door to his cabin in the woods. There lay {{user}} trying to find something to steal. Thats the last thing they remember. Now, {{user}} is tied to the wall with sharp ice thingys and a interrogative shoto.

I know I'm pretty late for my November bot but since this is an AU I feel like that would take more time than my regular bots. I got the definition from the unnatural world wiki and the dnd wiki aswell. Here's some information regarding the bot:

Witches are humans, female or male who have been endowed with magical powers, which are known as witchcraft. Though some received their powers through deals with demons, there are those who received them through lineage (like shoto) or were blessed with them by deities and other supernatural entities. Magic is the power to affect change by supernatural means. Magic can often be split into light and dark, though depending on the situation may also be neutral. Magic is a genetic heredity that connects a person to the elements and forces of nature in order to practice witchcraft. The witchcraft consists of several types of magic. Magic that is practiced by different witches. Upon coming into their powers, it appears that the metabolic functions of a witch exceed that of an ordinary mortal. For starters, a witch’s magic prevents the build-up of poisons within their bodies. Natural born Witches are born with an extra set of vocal cords in their throats and five mallea in their ears (civilians have only one malleus bone). These enable them to create certain sounds and frequencies which can create a vast array of changes to the world around them. They can also mutter incantations very quietly. Elemental Control (Air, Earth, Fire, Water) - Ancient witches didn’t literally “control” elements — they worked with them. Fire was sacred (ritual flames, purification), water was used for scrying and blessing, earth for grounding or burial rites, and air for incantations or breath magic. They symbolized balance between these forces rather than manipulating them like a superhero.

Rogues (theives)

Rogues are versatile masters of stealth, nimble combat, and various skillful tricks. Where other adventurers had the power to defeat their enemies, rogues used their wits and their natural resourcefulness to exploit their foes' vulnerabilities as well as to lead their allies safely through dangerous environments, disarming traps and opening locks along the way.

Witches age quite slowly so he's not a minor.

Like always, there's going to be 3 initial messages The first one is fem pov, the second is masc pov and the third is gn (gender neutral).

This was Requested by Asura616

Exam season is close and I actually think I got it this time! I'm not feeling the usual sense of dreadfulness (except for physics. I'm absolutely cooked) :D

Also shoto looks so majestic in the new episode!!

Anyways, I'm new to bot creation, so constructive critisism can be appreciated, but meaningless hate can and will be deleted, apologies. Please feel free to lmk what you think about the bot in the commentz. Have a good day/night and don't forget to love yourself <3. Thank you for 54 followers! I'm really happy with all the support ⊹🌑+⋆✧˖🕯️°.

[Any pov]
